summary: Post-spike decay vs Senate vote catalyst creates balanced Increase/Decrease probability
content: Feb 18 value ~25, decaying from House passage peak of 100 on Feb 12. Pre-spike baseline ~7-8. Senate vote announced for 'next week' (Feb 23-27) by Thune. Talking filibuster adds drama. 8-day window means natural decay would push below 22 (Decrease) without catalyst. Senate action could re-spike above 28 (Increase). Narrow [22,28] band hard to maintain (Doesn't change unlikely). Final: Increases 38%, DC 22%, Decreases 40%.
